events.title: DRAW PHASE Presents TCGs @ Sakura-Con - Friday
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Welcome to the Sakura-Con x DRAW PHASE 2026 Trading Card Games room! We'll be running totally FREE events wall to wall all weekend long, from Learn to Play events, to Drafts, Sealed, Constructed, and more for some of your favorite games! Any event you do in the room will earn you a ticket that you can jealously hoard until Sunday when we have our Grand Giveaway, full of prizes generously donated by our lovely sponsors, donors, and friends. 

Whether you're a seasoned pro or a you've never played a card game in your life, we'll have content for you! Come learn a game you have always wanted to play or one you've never even heard of. And best of all, every single thing in this room is FREE! So if you want to come hang out with your fellow con-goer, meet some new friends and learn some fun games along the way, our team of dedicated volunteers will be here all weekend to guide you through the wonderful world of cardboard.

DRAW PHASE is a 501(c)(3) Non-Profit Organization that provides TCG Content in the PNW at no cost to the attendee! If you're interested in learning more, ask a volunteer.

events.title: Magic: the Gathering – Casual Commander w/ Loaner Library
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Come play a casual Commander game with friends, strangers, or even DRAW PHASE Staff!

Pods of 4 will be seated on-demand. No deck? No problem! We've got a library of pre-constructed decks you can borrow for the duration of your game. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

events.title: Flesh and Blood – Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Dear Con-goer, do you desire Flesh? Do you desire Blood? Perhaps even both at the same time? In that case, we at the TCG Room have you covered. Come see us and one of our Flesh Experts (Blood Experts available upon request) will teach you all the ins and outs of the Flesh and Blood TCG. Should you survive the trials, you will be rewarded with a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

All materials for Flesh and Blood were graciously donated by Legend Story Studios, who are a fantastic partner.

events.title: Opening Ceremonies Doors Open
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: Grand Archive – Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Welcome to the Archive, Champion – do you have what it takes to forestall an apocalypse?

Come find out and learn Grand Archive, a growing new TCG fusing anime aesthetics with the best of western game design! Along with your demo kit, all participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

All material graciously provided by Grand Archive’s developer Weebs of the Shore. Thank you for your continued support, WotS!

events.title: AMV History 2000+ and Fundamentals
events.panelDescription:
[Fan Panel] Presented by Chris Allen and Cheri Allen

Join us on a fast‑paced ride through the evolution of AMVs! Starting from the law-breaking chaos of the early 2000s to today’s high‑power, pro‑level creations. We will unpack the tech, tricks, and cultural turning points that shaped the AMV community. Whether you’re a first‑time editor or a seasoned master, you'll learn sharp insights on storytelling, audio, visual quality, and the tools that make modern AMVs shine.

events.title: JUST DANCE to Your Heart's Content!

Join us for a random dance panel of hit classics from the Just Dance series such as Rasputin, Toxic, Hips Don't Lie, etc! Stick around towards the end to compete in the ultimate dance off and win some prizes!

events.title: Sonic: An Unfortunate History
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Sonic the Hedgehog is a staple holding together the childhood of any proper 90s kid, but just like Soap shoes he’s tragically out of fashion. We’ll be going over the history of Sonic The Hedgehog games, Sega Consoles, Crush 40, and various chili dogs.

events.title: Examining the Cultural Impact of One Piece
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Let's set sail for adventure and dive deep into analyzing the impacts of the cultural phenomenon that is One Piece. From its impact on media to the intersection of manga and real world politics, join the FWHS Anime/Manga Club to discuss why this formula has won out over a crowded field of Shonen manga and anime to reshape the medium.

events.title: Digimon Card Game – Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Di-Di-Digimon! Digital Monsters, The Card Game! Come help to save the digital world and learn to play this rich card game that has captivated audiences since 2020! Change yourself into a digital champion and save the digital world. And after you're done digivolving, you'll receive a pack on us to start your journey and a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Netrunner -- Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Come learn the Netrunner TCG directly from the team developing it! Null Signal Games has sent us their very best to teach you how to be the best Runner you can be! All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Ultra Fight Da ! Kyanta 2 Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] The most unhinged fighting game you've never heard of. Absurd characters, chaotic gameplay, and more memes per minute than your Discord server. Win prizes!

events.title: Project Justice Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Rival Schools is back! Form teams, pull off team-up attacks, and settle high school drama the only way that matters: with your fists. Win prizes!

events.title: When Anime Takes the Stage
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] What happens when our favorites leave the 2D world to enter our 3D space? We get the wonderful world of 2.5D. We’ll examine the origins of 2.5D and the many aspects that bring our favorite stories to the stage! This panel focuses specifically on adaptations for anime, manga, and video games for the stage. From the stage design to original songs and casting there’s so much to explore!

events.title: Lupin the 3rd: A Beginner's Guide
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] The thrilling criminal exploits of gentleman-thief Lupin III have stolen the hearts of viewers for over 55 years! Come find out more about this this long-running series with a tour of the anime's TV and movie highlights—from the groovy '70s, to 21st-century Toonami, to the theatrical Firsts—and learn where to start watching or explore next!

events.title: Out of Pocket (Monsters) Hot Takes!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Calling all Trainers, Masters, and Poké-enthusiasts! Join us for a lively, no-holds-barred panel where we dive into the most controversial, bold, and sometimes downright unpopular opinions from across the Pokémon fandom. From “Starter choices that got robbed” to “regions that deserve more love (or less)”, battle your strongest opinions with other trainers!

events.title: All the Feels
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Why settle for just one feels, when you can feel ALL the feels!

events.title: Artist Alley Open
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: Charity Auction Viewing
events.panelDescription: [Charity Auction]

events.title: Dreamland Maid Cafe
events.panelRoom: Dreamland Maid Cafe - Elliot Bay Room
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel]

events.title: Plurality in Anime and Real Life
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] The notion of multiple people sharing a body has always been intriguing to storytellers, but many people aren't aware that plurality isn't fictional! Japanese media in has depicted plurality in various forms, so we'll be taking a look at what's accurate, what's not, and what we love anyway.

events.title: Sakurumble Doors Open
events.panelDescription: [Summit Stage]

events.title: Weiss Schwarz - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Have you ever wanted every Anime ever made in one TCG? Well then you'll love Weiss Schwarz! Come relive climactic battles and moments from your favorite Anime and learn a mechanically deep TCG while you're at it! Hosted by our resident Anime TCG Expert, you'll be guided through your first game and then be on your way to being a champion! All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

events.title: Pokemon TCG – Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] "Sure, maybe you can identify all the original 151 just by their silhouettes, sing every word of “Gotta Catch ‘Em All” to yourself in the shower, and have a full shiny living ‘dex on Pokémon HOME - but if you really want to be the Champion, you have to be ready to take on all comers, anytime, anywhere… even at the card table.

That’s where we come in! Swing by and learn to play from some of the best trainers around, courtesy of Tabletop Village’s elite roster.

All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway – so start your climb to the top here, and aim to become the very best. You know it’s your destiny."

events.title: One Piece TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Obtain Fame, Wealth, and Power beyond your wildest dreams by coming to the TCG Room and learning to play the One Piece TCG! Will you be able to find the buried treasure- Or perhaps the treasure is actually the friendships you formed in your journey? No matter what, if you complete a learn to play session you will receive a ticket for our Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Arc System Works' gorgeous anime graphics meets Granblue's beloved characters. Easy to learn, deep to master, and perfect for settling your crew debates. Top 3 win prizes!

events.title: The Fall of the House of Miyazaki
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Hayao Miyazaki did a lot of work to make anime acceptable to mainstream audiences. Not by creating high quality art, but by making something so bad that everything else looked quality in comparison.

events.title: Infrastructure of Japan
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Buildings, roads, power and urban planning are all apart of what makes as civilization function. Come and learn about some of the unique projects that make Japan work.

events.title: Symbology Of Japanese Textiles 2.0
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Every stitch tells a story. In The Symbology of Japanese Textiles 2.0, we’ll explore the meanings woven into traditional kimono and obi. These symbols aren’t just decorative; in anime, character outfits often use traditional patterns to signal personality traits, backstories, and hidden narrative clues. Join me as we uncover how textile symbolism enriches Japanese culture and storytelling, adding depth, identity, and intention to everyday garments and beloved characters alike.

events.title: Voice Acting Secrets with Cassandra Lee Morris
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] Cassandra Lee Morris has voiced over 200 roles in video games, anime and animation. How'd she get there? What's the secret behind breaking into voice acting? How the heck does she create all those voices? Cassandra answers your questions and more in this one-on-one panel.

events.title: Cosplay Wrestling Federation: Sakurumble VI! - Day 1
events.panelDescription: [Summit Stage] The CWF, THE MOST ELECTRIFYING show in Anime Sports Entertainment, returns to the Pacific Northwest at Sakura-Con to proudly present to you SAKURUMBLE as a two-day event! This show will feature wrestlers of the CWF from franchises big and small, young and old as they clash to settle grudges, vie for superiority, defend their pride, and more, in a series of (contactless) exhibition-style battles of mic skills, bravado, and possibly shenanigans! Who will stand tall and who will tumble, in the sixth annual Sakurumble?! Only you can decide! Come join us to not only watch, but with your cheers and jeers steer the course of this exciting new installment of C! W! F!

events.title: Kpop PC trading
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you looking for that last card to finish your collection? Or maybe you just love trading PCs of your bias. Either way, we may have what you need! Come and trade photocards with other kpop fans or maybe just come and hang out. All are welcome!

events.title: Grandpa's AMV Stash
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] The old farts running this thing have been AMV fans since long before you were a twinkle in your daddy's eye. Come see what was popular when they were your age, along with a few cloud-shouting rambles on what the community was like back in the "good ol' days!"

events.title: Learn ParaPara Dance
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Come learn parapara! A Japanese style of synchronized dance commonly done to eurobeat music. Easy for beginners to pick up and and a lot of fun for more advanced dancers as well!

events.title: Brittney Karbowski AMA
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Naoya Nakayama Director's Panel Rhythm, Motion, and Emotion
events.panelDescription:
[Guest of Honor] Join us for the visual mastery behind YOASOBI’s “Idol” music video, and live performance direction on UMA MUSUME PRETTY DERBY: NEW ERA'S DOOR, dance animation for KAGUYA-SAMA: LOVE IS WAR, and ending sequences for OSHI NO KO!
Naoya is especially skilled at condensing story and emotional intensity into short runtimes, and is highly regarded as a creator who balances pop appeal with visual beauty. He is currently active across multiple fields, including music videos, ending animations, and live performance direction.
In this panel, Nakayama will discuss his creative process, approach to character performance, how he designs animation around music and timing, and what goes into directing short-form and music-centered animation. From pop spectacle to delicate acting moments, discover how he compresses story and energy into every frame.

Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. events.title: The Kompany Dance Workshop
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] An in-depth dance workshop open to all, featuring choreography from a popular K-pop song. The workshop will be taught by a Dance Captain from the University of Washington’s first and only K-pop dance team, The Kompany.

events.title: "Isekai": Japanese VS Korean VS Chinese
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Join us in exploring the similarities and differences of the isekai (/isegye/transmigration) genre in Japanese, Korean, and Chinese media! This panel will cover various manga, anime, manhwa, manhua, webnovels, and some live actions.

events.title: Cardfight Vanguard!! Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Ever wanted to try out an Anime card game known for being easy to learn and incredibly fun to master? Cardfight Vanguard!! is right up your alley then! Come and play with one of our Starter Decks and be guided through a game by one of our volunteers! Complete a Learn to Play session and receive a ticket for the Sunday Giveaway!

events.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Free Standard Tournament
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Welcome, Duelist! Here's something a bit more modern for you – a Standard Format Yu-Gi-Oh Tournament. Come over to the TCG Room and prove you're the best duelist at Sakura-Con (besides Kaiba, of course) and put your skills on display. Eager to show off your Ryzeal deck? Or maybe you're still playing Tenpai Dragon? – No matter what you're playing, we encourage you to stop by and win some prizes.

Three rounds of best-of-one games. All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway, as well as one pack per win!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Two loaner decks are available upon request (First come first serve) upon request as part of your reservation. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Japanese Tea Ceremony
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Presentation of Japanese culture through Japanese Tea Ceremony demonstration and lecture.

events.title: Cut it Out! An AMV Masking Deep Dive
events.panelDescription:
[Fan Panel] Presented by CMDR Sariah and Winterblade AMVs

Do you have incredible ideas for crossover AMVs? Want to smooth out your transitions and create a sense of flow? Looking for a new technical skill to add to your AMV editing toolkit? If so, then this panel will teach you everything you need to know about it.

events.title: Um, Actually: Con Edition
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Nerds like a lot of things, but above all else, they love correcting people! This is Um, Actually! Do you know a lot of nerdy facts about media and nerd culture? Do you want to test your nerdy knowledge for the chance to win a prize? Then come join us for another round of Um, Actually! Based on the DropOut TV show, contestants will be tasked with correcting pedantically incorrect for the chance to win points. Whoever has the most points by the end of each round will win, and claim a prize. There will be three rounds, each of which is themed based on the kinds of statements need corrected (e.g. Western Media, Japanese Media, Gaming, etc.) And the best part yet? Audience members are encouraged to participate! So come and join us!

events.title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to a Panel
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] For forty years The Legend of Zelda has invited gamers to a world of adventure and wonder. Celebrate The Legend of Zelda's 40th Anniversary with a review of the games, the lore, and everything that makes this franchise so beloved.

events.title: Cosplay is for EVERY body, A plus size cosplay panel
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Join me as we dive into the beautiful world of body diversity in cosplay! We will discuss practical ways to level up your fitting skills, ways to alter prebought cosplays, and photography tipsthat help you be seen exactly as you want to be seen. Cosplay is for EVERY body, so let's talk about it.

events.title: The Best of the West
events.panelDescription:
[Fan Panel] Presented by Tyken

AMV usually means Anime Music Video.  But Animation in the West (really anywhere besides Japan) hasn't just been sitting still behind the behemoth that is the Anime industry. There have been some truly unique and amazing Western cartoons in the past two decades.

events.title: JoJo Pose off! With Bill Butts
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] Come dressed in your best JoJo cosplay and compete against other cosplayers in a JoJo Pose-Off set to the beat of JoJo intros, judged by Bill Butts! Cosplay not required but highly recommended. The winner gets 3 free prints of their choosing.

events.title: Blue Encount Q&A
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Two Rooms and a Boom
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social deception game of hidden roles and deduction, players are divided into 2 different rooms. Find your teammates, establish trust, and exchange hostages before time runs out and the bomb explodes!

events.title: Two Rooms and a Boom
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social deception game of hidden roles and deduction, players are divided into 2 different rooms. Find your teammates, establish trust, and exchange hostages before time runs out and the bomb explodes!

events.title: Intro to Vtubing and Vtuber Culture
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Ever wonder how to get started in vtubing or who are those anime people performing at anime concerts or talking to people at the con through the tv and ipad? Come swing by to learn about vtubers and vtuber culture!

events.title: League of Family Feud!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Come compete against fellow League of Legends players, Arcane enjoyers, and overall gamers in this League of Legends themed Family Feud! Which Arcane character didn't deserve what happened to them? How big of a loss streak do you have to go on before you go nonverbal? Why would a League player go outside? Find out the answers to all of these questions at this panel! Fun prizes for those who participate!

events.title: Digimon Card Game – Free Sealed Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] I've run out of Digimon puns and lyrics, so unfortunately you'll just have to settle with a Sealed tournament for free! Come visit us in the TCG Room and play a round of sealed Digimon on the house, complete with prizes and a ticket to all entries for our Grand Giveaway on Sunday!Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Echoes of Astra - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] This one's new! Echoes of Astra is a brand-new TCG from Parhelion Studios, an anime art themed game that mixes traditional TCG Gameplay with the tactical depth of war gaming! All wrapped in the package of some beautiful cardboard. If you want to learn a brand new TCG that is just starting this is your chance to get in on the ground floor! All participants will receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!

All our materials for Echoes of Astra were graciously donated by Parhelion Studios, so a big thank you to them for allowing us to show their game to you. Come over to the TCG Room and one of our experienced volunteers will teach you all about this tactically rich, exciting new game!

events.title: Galaxy Fight (One Second Timer) Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Classic arcade fighter with a twist—rounds have a 1-second timer! Adapt or perish in this high-speed cosmic clash. Can you win before time runs out? Win prizes!

events.title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate Tournament 1
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Everyone is here! Bring your main and prove they're top tier. First of four brackets, so there's plenty of chances to shine. Win prizes!

events.title: Intro to World Fusion Belly Dance
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you ever wanted to shimmy and shake until you couldn’t any more? Move your body in a creative way to express yourself for skits or just in general? Look no further! Join Eekie and learn some of the basics of belly dance. No prior experience necessary!

events.title: Dungeons & Disappointment: Stop Rescheduling, Start Playing
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Cancelled another game session? Added another half-finished campaign notebook to the stack? We say no more! Come join us and identify keys for building a strong TTRPG table from both the GM and player perspectives. Learn tips to run and play in consistent, efficient, and engaging games. Receive resources for supporting scheduling, pushing plot, and crafting memorable (and complete) campaigns. Systems highlighted: D&D, Kids on Bikes, Obojima, Path Finder, and Call of Cthulhu.

events.title: So You Want to Enter an AMV Contest?
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] With so many AMV contests out there with floods of entries, it can be turbulent and sometimes even confusing to navigate the high seas of submission rules. Come on board and join our crew of AMV editors turned AMV Contest Coordinators as they provide tips and techniques to help steer you in the right direction. Oh, and questions are always welcome!

events.title: Haruki Ishiya Autograph
events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Moriguchika Autograph
events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Hiroshi Nagahama Q&A
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] Join Hiroshi Nagahama for an open Q&A session! With experience spanning animation, design, and episode direction, he’s excited to talk about the craft and share insights from across the production process. He’d also love to hear your thoughts and impressions on the works he’s been involved with.

events.title: Umamusume Osaka Hai Fan Festival!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Horse girls are coming to celebrate the JRA's annual Osaka Hai! Join us to test your wit training with Umamusume trivia and form teams to compete in mini races! Compete in your very own Osaka Hai by participating in an in-game Room Match!!

events.title: Cosplay on a Budget!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] This panel will teach you how to elevate your cosplay for less. Whether you want to make your own costumes or alter premade ones, we have tips and tricks for cosplaying cost-effectively. There’s no need for fancy tools or expensive materials — from wigs, props, costumes, and more, we have you (and your wallet) covered!

events.title: Getting Started with Content Creation
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you looking to started with content creation and live-streaming and don't know where to start? Join experienced content creators from the Seattle Online Broadcasters Association with experience in gaming live-streams, vtubing, creative and artistic content, and charity streaming for a question and answer session to answer any question you may have!

events.title: When Manga and Music Collide
events.panelDescription:
[Fan Panel] Presented by Violet Skies

Have you ever wanted to see your favorite manga come to life? Witness characters leap off the page as we explore the incredible artistry of Manga Music Videos.  With custom rigging, animation and color, we can even pretend that our favorite manga got the anime we knew they deserved!

We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. events.title: Steel sword fighting through Historical European Martial Arts (HEMA)
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] A showcase of Historical European Martial Arts, a study of various sword arts dating from 14th century all the way to 17th and 18th century. Realistically weighted steel training weapon simulators are used alongside protective gear to allow for as close to sword fighting in its purest form. Weapons include: longsword, rapier, sword & buckler, and saber.

events.title: Intro to Improv
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Welcome to the world of improv comedy. We'll be teaching you some of our tips and tricks to come up with your best comedy skills with a series of sketches. A small lecture throughout as well. Come join us for all the fun and hilarity.

events.title: Flesh and Blood - Free Silver Age Precon Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Step into the arena with FREE ready-to-play Silver Age preconstructed decks, officially sponsored by LSS. Experience the thrill of strategic 1v1 combat while making new friends in a fun and welcoming tournament setting! This event is a great chance to learn your first hero or try out a new class.All participants also receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Vampire Savior Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Darkstalkers 3, baby! Fast-paced vampire hunters vs. creatures of the night. Chain those combos and show everyone why this is the hypest Capcom fighter. Win prizes!

events.title: So, You think it's a Sports Anime...It's Actually a BL
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you ever watched a sports anime and just thought "those two boys should kiss?" Well, we are right there with you! Come join us as we dissect popular sports anime and come to the conclusion that,"yes, they really SHOULD kiss."

events.title: The Art of Lip Sync
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Learn the fundamentals of lip sync performance from start to finish. This panel covers the application process, how to get started with lip syncing, and essential on-stage tips to help you perform with confidence and connect with your audience. Perfect for beginners and anyone looking to level up their lip sync skills.

events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Studio Orange Autograph
events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Jill Harris Q&A
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Nerds doing science
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you ever realized that a lot of people with nerdy hobbies also happen to have nerdy jobs? Join our panel of scientists, engineers, and other STEM professionals who also happen to do cosplay, comedy, or nerdy art! Learn how they combine their professional life with their side-gigs or hobbies, how those two sometimes intersect, and leave inspired to use your creativity across all aspects of your life!

events.title: Zapp's Spaceship of Love
events.panelDescription: [Main Stage] 2025 sucked. We all know it; it was basically the worst year ever. However, like any bold, tanned leader with blond wispy hair, our beloved Captain heard this claim and promptly responded: "Hold my Slurm®." Captain Zapp has thus established the "Department About Ruining Everything", and needs the worst, most poorly trained group of individuals imaginable to run it into the ground. Think you're the worst person for the job and will only make the world a worse place than it already is? Come in, apply, and if you're right, we'll give you the job on the spot!

events.title: Super Happy Fun Time: Photo Scavenger Hunt - Summit
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you want to take photos with your friends or enemies? Come join the SHFT Ladies in their Photo Scavenger Hunt - Summit location, where you will be tasked to take selfies and photos for points! This game requires a smart phone with access to the internet.

events.title: AMV Creators Showcase
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Meet the editors behind your favorite AMVs!

events.title: Examining the Cross-pollination of Anime and Gaming
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] In an age where gaming and anime are both fording the zeitgeist into the mainstream, influences and subcultures intersect! Join the FWHS Anime/Manga Club in a historical review of the influence of our fandom on trends in the gaming industry and wild speculation over where we can go from here!

events.title: Smokey Cheesecake
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] 2025 was a hot year with even hotter desserts! Come watch some fire AMVs with sweet and tasty breaks in between.

events.title: Kpop Fun and Games
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] If you are a fan of Kpop and all things related then please join us for fun games like dance charades, guess the song, and more! All who wish to participate are welcome!

events.title: Mallorie Rodak Q&A
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Karaoke Idol Round 1
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: Social Deception: Tasters
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social Deception variety hours! Quick fast-paced games! A variety of choice! Experience a broad swath of Deception games you could play at home!

events.title: Vocaloid Song Trivia!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Come test your knowledge on Vocaloid and Vsynth songs in this Jeopardy-style trivia game! We've got a variety of different songs and genres to suit the tastes of all fans, whether you're a recent listener or a veteran! With songs ranging from the classics to the exciting new ones, you'll always have a chance to win a prize!

events.title: 18+ Cosplay Skit Contest Doors Open
events.panelDescription: [Summit Stage]

events.title: Weiss Schwarz - Free Neo-Standard Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Did you remember to bring your Weiss deck to con? If so, we think you'll love this Neo-Standard format tournament. Come on down to the TCG room and battle it out with other players to prove you're the best Weiss Schwarz player at Sakura-Con - and win some prizes, too! All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

events.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Terry Bogard is back! SNK's legendary franchise returns with new mechanics and classic characters. Are you okay? BUSTAH WOLF! Win prizes!

events.title: UNDER NIGHT IN-BIRTH II Sys:Celes Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] French-Bread's cult classic fighting game with the sickest music and deepest lore. GRD management, stylish combos, and absolute cinema. Top 3 win prizes!

events.title: Compliment Dueling
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Tired of trolls, fighting in the comments, and insult culture? Want to make your conversational openers top-notch? Join us as we discuss the art of the compliment and host a tournament where contestants uplift each other and bring surprising insights while vying to be the very best at making others feel seen!

events.title: Hiroshi Nagahama Autograph
events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Your Digital Innie: Modern Security and Identity
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] A presentation about personal digital privacy and security. Links to themes from anime like Ghost in the Shell, Serial Experiments Lain, and Psycho Pass.

events.title: Cosplay Chess Pre-Meet
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Required in-person meeting for all participants in the Cosplay Chess games.

events.title: 18+ Cosplay Skit Contest
events.panelDescription: [Summit Stage] See your favorite characters come to life on stage! The Sakura-Con 18+ Skit is a competition showcase of stage performance, open to Cosplayers of all levels of experience.

events.title: One Piece TCG - Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: AMV Category Courtroom
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Attention rules lawyers! Can YOU make a case for why that Action AMV was actually Romance? Do Grave of the Fireflies AMVs ever belong in Comedy? Join us for improvisational wackiness as we recruit “Category Lawyers” from the audience to zealously litigate for some very twisted category choices! YOU are the jury!

events.title: Jordan and Kelsey Cruz Q&A
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: The 8th Anime Jeopardy
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Welcome to our 8th year of Anime Jeopardy at Sakuracon! Know a lot about anime? Wanna test your knowledge against other players? Come and join us for a great time and some great prizes. Audience participation is offered as well if you want to sit in your seat and not have to go up to the front.

events.title: MARRIAGE TOXIN Panel – Battle for Marriage!
events.panelDescription:
[Guest of Honor] Join us and special guest Haruki Ishiya (voice of Hikaru Gero) from the
brand-new anime MARRIAGETOXIN. Learn all about the new series, Ishiya-san’s experience
and get a closer look at “the world’s toughest mission for love” you won’t want to miss!

events.title: Free Build Session
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

events.title: Husky Wushu
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Wushu is a Chinese martial art and international sport derived from hundreds of years of traditional Chinese Kung Fu. Husky Wushu has been an active club at UW since 2009, with a mission to foster an inclusive community around the practice of Chinese martial arts. We will be performing a medley of individual forms, group forms and fight sets, including hand forms and weapon forms such as sword, staff, and fan. We'll be doing a workshop after our performance, so stick around to learn some skills from us!

events.title: Learn Wotagei with Sakuraka
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Wotagei is a Japanese light stick dance famously seen in Oshi no Ko. Sakuraka, Seattle's own wotagei team, will showcase the art form and also teach you a basic skill so you too can dance to your favorite J-music!

events.title: Dungeons and Decisions; 100 Players, 1 Character
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Gather round as we tell the tale of Ehverie Bahdy, a feeble knight who goes on a great quest. Join us on a choose-your-own-adventure game of Dungeons and Dragons where everyone in the audience plays a part in the decisions made by our single character!

events.title: Is a Sandwich Enough?' The Cruel Humor of Needs in Chainsaw Man
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] A satirical but serious look at everyone's favorite devil hunters from Chainsaw Man, and how our societal structures prevent them from fulfilling basic and emotional needs. WARNING: Spoilers for the Public Safety saga!

events.title: Your Waifu/Husbando Is Trash
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] It's back- everyone's favorite gameshow where you rave about your husbando or waifu while the audience judges! Show up for laughs, prizes, and memories that will keep you coming back for years to come.

events.title: Mecha History and Cultural Impact: Now on Blu-Ray!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] From the beginning of modern anime, there have been robots. But where did the word "robot" come from? When did they become giant, and where did the word Mecha come from? Just how giant can they get, and how powerful? What should I watch if I'm curious, but totally unfamiliar? What is Tokusatsu, and how does it relate to Power Rangers? If you've ever had any of these questions, this is a good place to get them answered! The history goes back farther than you would believe, and the impact on culture spreads farther than you would expect!

events.title: Outlining with Lyrics
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Rider4Z gives her tips and tricks on how to use lyrics to one's full advantage when building AMVs.

events.title: Kristen McGuire AMA
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Hyperfixation Hour, What's Yours?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you have a hyperfixation that you wish you someone else knew about? Well, now is your chance to make it known. Take 2 minutes to explain your hyperfixation to our panel and the audience to try and convince them that it is something worthy of their time and research. Our panel will rate how enthralling and interesting your hyperfixation comes across. Prizes will be available for those that captivate the judges and crowd the most.

events.title: Samurai Undressed
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Get up close and personal with the samurai!  Discover what lies beneath the armor figuratively and literally! See how the individual components of Japanese armor were worn and what types of accessories and weapons a samurai may have carried into battle. Learn about interesting places to visit in Japan if you’re a fan of these ancient warriors!

events.title: Open Mic
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: Prize Room Open
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents]

events.title: A Practical Guide to Panel Profanity
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you a fan of running SC-MA content? Are you finding your vocabulary getting stale, leading attendees sighing at repeated word use? This is the panel for you! Ran by veterans of MA content we will guide you through the best ways to spice up your dialogue while avoiding any pitfalls.

events.title: Flesh and Blood - Free Silver Age Precon Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Step into the arena with FREE ready-to-play Silver Age preconstructed decks, officially sponsored by LSS. Experience the thrill of strategic 1v1 combat while making new friends in a fun and welcoming tournament setting! This event is a great chance to learn your first hero or try out a new class.All participants also receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Grand Archive – Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] You’ve learned how to start the fight, Champion – now let’s find out if you can finish it. Take up your provided starter deck, and go toe-to-toe with your peers in a test of skill alone. But remember: even in defeat, there is victory… in the form of a ticket to the Grand Giveaway.

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

All material graciously provided by Grand Archive’s developer Weebs of the Shore. Thank you for your continued support, WotS!

events.title: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate Tournament 2
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 2 of Smash mayhem! Different bracket, same high-stakes platform fighting. Show off those edge guards. Win prizes!

events.title: Idol Showdown Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Your favorite VTubers duke it out in this indie fighting game phenomenon. Represent your oshi and settle the ultimate question: who's best girl? Win prizes!

events.title: Top 20 Comedy AMVs Countdown
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] As if just showing comedy AMVs was not enough! No, we had to go and turn it into a countdown of some of the best ones! Come and find what is number 1.

events.title: Beginner's Gunpla with Chris Hackney
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] One of Chris’ favorite pastimes is to sit back with some relaxing music and build a giant robot suit that can destroy a small army. But when he can't do that, he settles for a 1/100th scale model instead. Let's talk about the basics of Gunpla, your favorite Gundam series, and maybe even win a prize!

events.title: Women in Video Games
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor] Come see some of your favorite voice actors discuss the ins-and-outs of voice acting for some of your favorite video games!

events.title: Tales from the Sea: Spooky Stories
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Hold your breath as you dive into this interactive storytelling panel that explores nautical stories from Japan, including scary monsters that dwell in the ocean. You know Ariel, but do you know Ningyo? Don't stay on the beach, cause what do they got, a lot of sand? We got tales that are grand!

events.title: Digimon Card Game - Free Starter Deck Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Level Up with AMV Editors
events.panelDescription:
[Fan Panel] Presented by Winterblade AMVs, ResyAMV, and TheDestineeAMV

This is a live AMV editing boot camp like no other! Join a panel of three editors as they review new AMVs and share tips and tricks on what makes a great edit.

events.title: Can Fandom Be Toxic?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Fandom can mean something different for everyone. Some find friends and family. Others find heated fan wars and a plethora of trolls. What does Fandom mean to you? Let's debate on whether Fandom are toxic or genuinely good.

events.title: BrightNRose K-Pop RDP
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We want to see you Eat it up! Eat it! Eat it UP! Come have fun and show off your moves at our K-Pop Random Play Dance Panel. We will play some classic and new K-pop AND J-pop tracks. Spectators are welcome! You can just come, sit, and watch the fun.

events.title: Snowball Earth – Episodes 1 & 2 Special Screening
events.panelDescription:
[Industry Panel ] The earth has frozen over—and a new story of survival begins.
Join us for a special screening of Episode 1 and the Global Premiere of Episode 2 of the TV anime Snowball Earth!

Based on the manga by Yuhiro Tsujitsugu, Snowball Earth depicts a breathtaking, ice-covered future Earth brought to life through stunning animation and a powerful narrative. This special panel offers fans the rare opportunity to experience the very beginning of the series ahead of its global streaming.

Don’t miss this exclusive chance to witness the birth of Snowball Earth and receive a giveaway!

events.title: Beyond Anime High School: Anime For Grown-Ups
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Getting a little old for high school anime? Looking for something different? Let's look at some anime made for an older audience, about adult characters dealing with adult problems. About characters with jobs and responsibilities. Because there's more to life than teenage angst.

events.title: Free Build Session
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

events.title: The Floral Court Invitational: A Sakura-Con Nerd Prom
events.panelDescription:
[Sakura-Con Presents] Prepare for an evening where elegance blossoms and fandom flourishes! Sakura-Con proudly presents the Floral Court Invitational, an exclusive Nerd Prom event designed for those who dance to the beat of their own heart.

Step into a night of sophisticated celebration, where the vibrant spirit of anime and manga meets the timeless grace of a formal ball. Adorn your finest attire—whether it’s a stunning gown, a sharp suit, or the impeccably formal wear of your favorite character. This is your chance to shine, mingle with fellow enthusiasts, and create unforgettable memories under a canopy of cherry blossoms.

Be Crowned a Sakura Flower Messenger! The highlight of the evening is our prestigious Sakura Flower Messenger Contest. Aspiring envoys of elegance will showcase their unique style, grace, and passion for the Sakura-Con spirit. Judges will be seeking individuals who embody charm, poise, and a profound appreciation for our community. The chosen Flower Messengers will hold a place of honor, representing the beauty and camaraderie of Sakura-Con.

Indulge in an enchanting atmosphere, enjoy delightful music, and take to the dance floor as we celebrate our shared love for all things anime, manga, and Japanese culture. Join us for the Floral Court Invitational – where every dance is a story, and every attendee is part of a grand tradition!

events.title: Social Deception: Open-Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social Deception invites you to come play games from our collection! Self-guided, or run w/ staff help!

events.title: BOTC: Continuous Games
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Blood on the Clocktower: A social deduction game for 5-15 players! As many games as we can fit in the timeblock! Sign up for the next game, or join in midway as a traveler!

events.title: Waluigi Time!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Waluigi doesn't have his own game, but he has his own panel where he pays other people to talk about games he should have been in and how great he is.

events.title: Cosplay Lip Sync Workshop
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you new to cosplay lip sync or a seasoned performer? Then this workshop is for you! Come join in as we explore ways to sharpen our performance skills, provide tips on learning lyrics, and engage in fun activities to improve our choreography and character skills. All levels of performers are welcomed.

events.title: Cardfight Vanguard!! - Free Starter Deck Showdown!
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Ready for something a little bit more advanced? Did you just learn to play Cardfight Vanguard or are you a seasoned pro who just happened to see this event in your schedule app? (I see you). Either way, come on down and we'll furnish you with one of our starter decks, you'll play against some other Cardfighters and no matter what, you will get some cool prizes! Also for this year: You'll get to keep your deck! That's right; A free deck AND extra prizes! Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time. 8 Seat Event.

events.title: Echoes of Astra - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] This one's new! Echoes of Astra is a brand-new TCG from Parhelion Studios, an anime art themed game that mixes traditional TCG Gameplay with the tactical depth of war gaming! All wrapped in the package of some beautiful cardboard. If you want to learn a brand new TCG that is just starting this is your chance to get in on the ground floor! All participants will receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday!

All our materials for Echoes of Astra were graciously donated by Parhelion Studios, so a big thank you to them for allowing us to show their game to you. Come over to the TCG Room and one of our experienced volunteers will teach you all about this tactically rich, exciting new game!

events.title: Netrunner -- Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Come learn the Netrunner TCG directly from the team developing it! Null Signal Games has sent us their very best to teach you how to be the best Runner you can be! All participants will receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Pokemon TCG – Free Build & Battle Event
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Oh, it’s all very fine and well to take your carefully-curated team to victory – but someone who’s true Champion material has that special something that lets them bond with a team they’ve only just met, intuitively understand their strengths and weaknesses, and lead them to glory.

How do you develop a talent like that, you ask?

Why, many rounds of Build & Battle, of course! Assemble your deck from the contents of the provided Build & Battle Box, and battle your way to to the top of the mountain… or at least to a good time. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: One Piece TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Obtain Fame, Wealth, and Power beyond your wildest dreams by coming to the TCG Room and learning to play the One Piece TCG! Will you be able to find the buried treasure- Or perhaps the treasure is actually the friendships you formed in your journey? No matter what, if you complete a learn to play session you will receive a ticket for our Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Gundam Battle Assault 2 Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 1 of Gundam Animayhem! Mobile suits clash in this classic PS1 fighter! Pick your favorite Gundam and show everyone why your timeline is superior. Win prizes!

events.title: FGC Trivia 1
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Think you know fighting games? Prove it! Bar trivia style with rounds on characters, stages, music, and deep lore. Your parents said gaming wouldn't be useful—time to prove them wrong! Win prizes!

events.title: Melodies of life (Final Fantasy Music Trivia)
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Few gaming franchises have shaped the soundscape of the industry quite like Final Fantasy. From the joyful rhythm of a Chocobo ride to the triumphant swell of the Victory Fanfare, the series’ iconic themes have become an emotional soundtrack for generations of fans. Crafted by legendary composers such as Nobuo Uematsu, Yoko Shimomura, and many more, these pieces are woven into the very identity of the franchise—its true Melodies of Life. In this interactive panel, attendees will put their musical memory to the test. Join us as contestants listen, guess, and compete to see whether the timeless music of Final Fantasy still resonates in the hearts of its most devoted fans. Whether you’re a seasoned Warrior of Light or a newcomer drawn by nostalgia, come celebrate the magic, history, and harmony of one of gaming’s greatest legacies.

events.title: Whose Line is it Anyway?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] An improv comedy show where the games of Whose Line is it Anyway are performed by you. Come join in for classic games like Unlikely Superheroes, Scenes from a Hat, Party Quirks, and more. Come join us for all the laughs and fun.

events.title: The Panel Hikaru Died
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Yoshiki thinks he and Hikaru need to do some trust-building to fully accept each other (definitely not because Hikaru’s body got taken over by a super dangerous spirit). Join two boys learning to have fun again with ridiculous improv games and interactive activities where you can decide what happens! Hikaru needs practice being human, Yoshiki needs help coping, and you like a good laugh. What could go wrong? Hosted by Uptown Cosplay and Simply Roo.

events.title: Yuri Faves From a Fujo
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you only ever read BL, but are now interested in reading GL too and don't know where to start? Or do you just like yuri and want some to hear some recommendations that range from fluffy to toxic? This is the panel for you!

events.title: Koi Koi Contest - Seating
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Seating for the Koi Koi Contest

events.title: Animemes: Anime Memes and You!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] With the internet and social media like Tiktok, IG, and X enabling more and more anime fans to share their love for anime every day, it becomes increasingly important to understand the memes powering the expansion of otaku culture. Join us as we talk anime, memes, and how they relate to you!

events.title: Koi Koi - AMV Contest
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There are so many fierce entries in the AMV contest that it breaks our hearts to have to narrow it down at all. Come let us know which video deserves justice by voting for your favorite of the non-finalists!

events.title: SCANDAL Concert
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Gundam: Building and Beyond
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Enter the world of cold steel and glossy plastic: An educational panel to explore the Gundam experience; tracing the franchise's evolution from its gritty wartime anime to the advanced engineering of modern Gunpla building.

events.title: Drag Race Doors Open
events.panelDescription: [Summit Stage]

events.title: HoloLive TCG - Learn to Play
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Do you like VTubers? Do you like Trading Card Games? Have I got news for you. These two things are together at last and you, yes YOU can come and learn to play this brand new TCG with all your favorite HoloLive personalities. Just come over to the TCG Room and we'll have someone waiting to teach you! All participants will receive a ticket for the grand giveaway on Sunday as well!

events.title: Dragon Ball FighterZ Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Arc Sys' love letter to Dragon Ball! 3v3 tag battles, movie-quality supers, and the most hype combos in gaming. Win prizes!

events.title: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby Tournament 1
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Horse girls race for glory! Place your bets with play money and win prize tickets based on the race results. Will your uma musume come in first? Win prizes!

events.title: Analog Edited AMVs (The Days of the Good Old VCR)
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] AMVs date back to the 80s and 90s way before nonlinear digital editing we are so used to. You'll be amazed at just how good and well-edited some of these videos can be.

events.title: Oriana Peron - Drag Race
events.panelDescription: [Guest of Honor]

events.title: Your Waifu/Husbando is Trash (Spicy Round)
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We are pleased to present ""Your Waifu/Husbando is Trash"" for an older audience. Come for the same entertainment, laughs and prizes as the SC-13 panel...but spicier!

events.title: Frankensteining Patterns for Cosplay
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Creating cosplays can be a challenge, from patterning to sewing & more. It can be even more of a challenge to know where to start. Join Hylian Cream, a Master Level Cosplayer, Sewing educator & Janome Maker, in learning how to Frankenstein commercial sewing patterns into the perfect fit for your next cosplay build! This panel will include interactive elements and go over important, beginner friendly details to help you get started.

events.title: Free Build Session
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] There will be a limited number of FREE kits available at each Free Build Session. These kits are first come, first serve. We highly recommend queuing in advance of each session. Registration will be required at the door for you to enter and work on your kit at one of our stations. Tools and assistance will be available along with both beginner and more advanced kits. You are also welcome to bring a kit of your own to any build session and use our tools or get assistance from one of our room staff members. All free build stations will need to be cleared at the end of the session to prepare for the next session.

events.title: Let's make a Vocaloid song together!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you like vocaloid/vocalsynths music and want to learn how to make them? We will go through some basic vocaloid terminology. Then let's make a vocaloid song together! Will it be a hit, or will it flop? No matter, let's have fun!

events.title: Persona 30th Anniversary Fan Panel
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] The Persona series started 30 years ago with Revelations: Persona back on the original PlayStation and now has become one of the biggest series coming out of Japan. This panel will be a fun look back over the past three decades with a room full of fellow fans. This will cover video games, anime, manga, music, and much much more. As well offering plenty of trivia questions with lots of prizes to giveaway.

events.title: Flesh and Blood - Free Draft Night Party!
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Swing big for a knockout as cheers and boos amp up the volume in this Super Slam booster draft! Build a deck on the fly as a face (Revered) or heel (Reviled) to play in a limited environment that will 100% surprise you with its technical depth and intricacies. Brownie points if you watched that one SuperEyePatch Wolf video that uses anime to explain pro wrestling! Also we respect Brody King in this house.  All participants also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

BONUS: If you see a bald guy in a power-chair (Or just ask for Stein) and tell him your favorite wrestler, he'll give you an extra promo card! 

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

events.title: Gundam Wing: Endless Duel Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 2 of Gundam Animayhem! The SNES Gundam fighter that goes incredibly hard. Deathscythe, Wing Zero, and more in fast-paced mecha combat. Win prizes!

events.title: Umamusume Horse-Story - Legends on the Track
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Whether you're just making your debut in the Uma world or if you're already a top trainer, saddle up for a trip through Umamusume history! In this panel, you'll learn the real life stories of Japan's most iconic racehorses. Behind every Umamusume is a horse racing legend - together, we'll race through the triumphs and heartbreaks of their careers, and learn how they shaped the personalities of our favorite trainees. Every race tells a story - and we can't wait to share them!

events.title: SCANDAL Post-Concert autograph
events.panelDescription: [Autographs]

events.title: Character Court!

Do you have a desire to play jury duty for some reason? If "Yes", come join the masterminds behind "Himbology 101" as they put some of your favorite characters on trial and you help them decide whether or not these characters deserve to be punished in the court of fictional law!"

events.title: AMVs From the Vault
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Is there an AMV you once saw years ago and have been longing to watch again? You just may find it here! We’ll be showing some obscure and hard-to-find AMVs from our extensive 20-year-old vault. Requests are encouraged!

events.title: WatchJojo Presents: AMV Trailers Good Enough for the Big Screen (SC-13)
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] WatchJojo returns! This year's list is our top picks of fan made parody or original trailers that are good enough for Hollywood.

events.title: Cosplay Chess All Game Dress Rehearsal
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Mandatory in person dress rehearsal for both Cosplay Chess games. All stage ninjas, pieces, and kings required.

events.title: Two Rooms and a Boom
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social deception game of hidden roles and deduction, players are divided into 2 different rooms. Find your teammates, establish trust, and exchange hostages before time runs out and the bomb explodes!

events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Social deception game of hidden roles and deduction, players are divided into 2 different rooms. Find your teammates, establish trust, and exchange hostages before time runs out and the bomb explodes!

events.title: Hot Anime Men in Your Area
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Do you like a good daddy? Lets talk about it. We're back and better than ever. Come talk with us as we define what makes a good daddy, and what differentiates them from other male archetypes. Join us as we pick at your favorite characters and decide if they are a daddy, a baby girl, a male wife or maybe something more.

events.title: FanDUMBS: A Fair & Balanced Analysis
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] We all can agree that fandom is cursed. All fandom. Any fandom. Yes, even your fandom. But why is that? What makes fandom the worst possible thing that a person can be invested in besides NFTs? Learn more as your completely normal and not-at-all-cringey hosts guide you through the history of bad fandom, regrets, and MAYBE how we can prevent this from happening to future fandoms.

events.title: Anisong Trivia
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Are you an anime music fan? Test your knowledge of anime songs against others in this competitive game show where YOU choose the songs! No matter your experience with anime music, there are songs for everyone in this panel! Competitors will be seeded in a live qualifier and placed will be placed into rounds where competitors pick stylized categories similar to Jeopardy. The best players will be placed into a grand final to determine the champion!

events.title: The Intergalactic Samurai: Star Wars and Japan
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] This panel will explore the vast influence Japanese culture and media has had on the creation and evolution of the Star Wars franchise.

events.title: Grand Archive – Learn to Play

[Gaming] Welcome to the Archive, Champion – do you have what it takes to forestall an apocalypse?

All material graciously provided by Grand Archive’s developer Weebs of the Shore. Thank you for your continued support, WotS!

events.title: Mystery Gundam Game Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Round 3 of Gundam Animayhem! Which Gundam fighting game will it be? Show up and find out! Your mecha knowledge will be tested. Win prizes!

events.title: BlazBlue: Cross Tag Battle Tournament
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] The ultimate anime crossover! Blazblue, Persona, RWBY, and Under Night characters team up. Resonance Blaze your way to victory! Win prizes!

events.title: Cultural Cross Polination
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] What's the most obscure reference you've ever seen in a cartoon, or anime, or a TV show? Remember when South Park had a full episode about Pokemon? Or when FLCL had a few seconds done in South Park's style? That's what this panel is all about. References, homages, parodies, back and forth, east to west, west to east. It goes back further than you'd think, and in many cases recently, it comes full circle where homages are being referenced, and made into whole new references!

Change yourself into a digital champion and save the digital world. And after you're done digivolving, you'll receive a pack on us to start your journey and a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

events.title: Zapp's Spaceship of Love: Loveline!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you been catfished by an AI Chatbot? Do you have Love in Deep Space installed, or worse yet, tell people you do? Have you gone to a comedy relationship advice panel and taken what they said seriously? If you answered yes to any of these questions; then that's really embarrassing. Thankfully, we're here for you on a purely plutonic level! No question is too stupid, too lewd, too real or too fake, so bring us your hardest hitting and most debilitating relationship questions, and we will answer them for you, satisfaction guaranteed and sometimes in song, or your money back!

events.title: Cosplay Chess After Dark - Mankind Vs. Monsters
events.panelDescription:

You get this year's Cosplay Chess After Dark! Check out the dark, twisted, and salacious fights piloted by our Kings' unhinged desires.

events.title: AMV Time Capsule: 2006

events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Did you just get out of the Rave, or a late-night panel, perhaps? Are you looking to still have some fun at the Con overnight? Well, if you brought your own cards, we've got space! The TCG Room may close its outer doors at midnight, but we have a number of free-play tables available for BYO style play. Want to jam out some 2 AM Commander? We got you.

This area is not staffed between the hours of Midnight and 9 AM. All tables are available for use, but we ask that you please clean up after yourselves and behave responsibly in the game space. Failure to comply with this is a violation of intergalactic law. Thank you, and see you bright and early for more scheduled content!

Young cave raider Riko dreams of finding her missing mother in the mysterious, monster-filled Abyss. After discovering Reg, a powerful robot boy with no memory of his past, the two set out together into the Abyss’s depths.

events.title: DRAW PHASE Presents TCGs @ Sakura-Con - Saturday
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Welcome to the Sakura-Con x DRAW PHASE 2026 Trading Card Games room! We'll be running totally FREE events wall to wall all weekend long, from Learn to Play events, to Drafts, Sealed, Constructed, and more for some of your favorite games! Any event you do in the room will earn you a ticket that you can jealously hoard until Sunday when we have our Grand Giveaway, full of prizes generously donated by our lovely sponsors, donors, and friends. 

Whether you're a seasoned pro or a you've never played a card game in your life, we'll have content for you! Come learn a game you have always wanted to play or one you've never even heard of. And best of all, every single thing in this room is FREE! So if you want to come hang out with your fellow con-goer, meet some new friends and learn some fun games along the way, our team of dedicated volunteers will be here all weekend to guide you through the wonderful world of cardboard.

DRAW PHASE is a 501(c)(3) Non-Profit Organization that provides TCG Content in the PNW at no cost to the attendee! If you're interested in learning more, ask a volunteer.

Come see us and one of our Flesh Experts (Blood Experts available upon request) will teach you all the ins and outs of the Flesh and Blood TCG. Should you survive the trials, you will be rewarded with a ticket for the Grand Giveaway on Sunday!

All materials for Flesh and Blood were graciously donated by Legend Story Studios, who are a fantastic partner.

events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Hatsune Miku is THE Virtual Idol, but have you ever wondered about who she is behind the hologram and blue twintails? At this panel, we'll be diving into Vocal Synth Producers! What they are, who they are, and the distinct styles of music that make each one of them unique. Everyone is welcome to come and attend; seasoned veterans, casual newbies, and the poor unsuspecting soul who needs something to do for an hour.

events.title: Spy x Family and Cold War Germany
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Espionage, assassins, surveillance, and secret identities, but what’s the truth behind the world of Spy x Family? Join us for a deep dive into the history of Cold War Germany and the true historical basis for the cool spy adventures!

events.title: Transitioning Humanity: This Is Not A Man
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] What do Arcane, Creature Commandos, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, and The Witch from Mercury have in common? All four explore the ethics and effects of human augmentation – of transhumanism. They ask how far science and technology can take humanity, and whether the cost is worth it. Join us for an in-depth examination of these new transhumanist narratives, how (if) they’ve been updated for our modern age, and where these shows draw the line on humanity.

events.title: Oh! That's A Baseball Episode!!
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you ever just been watching an anime when suddenly, out of left field, all the characters start playing baseball for an episode and it's the greatest thing ever? Whether it's there to throw a curveball into how you see the characters, or a change-up into the pacing, or just to bring out their animation aces, this is a panel about how anime's baseball episodes really hit it out of the park.

events.title: Kanto Pokemon Food Web
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Have you ever been curious about what Pokémon eat out in the wild? Well look no further than this presentation. Learn about what a food web created using the first generation of Pokémon would look like. It shows which Pokémon might prey on each other and how their size, typing and inspiration might affect that. It also tells us which species might be major producers, apex predators, or keystone species. Additionally we will be discussing what exactly a food web is, how it differs from a food chain, how Pokémon were categorized in order to put them onto the food web and how environmental factors change which Pokémon are included.

events.title: The 5 W's of Sumo - A Factual (But Fun!) Guide to the Basics
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Sumo is having a resurgence of popularity in Japan, thanks to new and powerful young wrestlers, but getting into the sport can be confusing. Who are all of these people? What are they doing? What are those poses?! Was that a FACE SLAP? Is that allowed??? Where are their clothes?!?! Why was this even invented? Let's run through the basics of this religious-ceremony-turned-national-sport to answer all of these questions and more!

events.title: Discover the Sound of Traditional Japanese Harps
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Join our interactive panel presenting beautiful Japanese music!Koto no WA, ensemble of local koto (Japanese harp) musicians in the Greater Seattle Area, will play both traditional and contemporary songs, including some songs from anime series. This workshop will be a combination of live demonstrations, a brief history lesson on Japanese music culture, Q & A sessions, and a hands-on experience with the koto. Don’t miss this rare opportunity to experience Japan’s traditional string instrument with more than a thousand years of history.

events.title: Tekken Bowl (Tekken Tag Tournament)
events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Why punch when you can bowl? The most ridiculous Tekken mode returns! Strike out your opponents in this bizarre but beloved minigame. Win prizes!

events.panelDescription: [Gaming] Morning races are here! Bet on your favorite horse girl and watch them dash to the finish line. Winning bettors get prize tickets! Win prizes!

events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Want to start your con day off with a bang? How about a pop! This k-pop inspired dance workout is the perfect way to wake up your body for a long day of walking around. Follow along to some k-pop inspired exercises, listening to your fav groups. No experience needed, just come have fun!!

events.title: Ultimate Anime Trivia
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] Need to prove that the hours you spent on anime fan wikis are worth something? Join us for Ultimate Anime Trivia! We'll cover a wide range of genres and shows. Feel free to form small teams with friends or with strangers around you and have some fun!

events.title: Evangelion AMVs
events.panelDescription: [Sakura-Con Presents] Evangelion continues to delight and perplex audiences with it's apocalyptic stakes and teen angst. Come check out a similarly eclectic mix of AMVs!

events.title: Crunchyroll Presents: Witch Hat Atelier Premiere Screening
events.panelDescription: [Industry Panel ] Everyone knows that magic-users are born, not made. This being a hard truth to swallow, Coco is about to give up her lifelong dream to be a witch ... until she meets the mysterious magician, Qifrey. By secretly watching Qifrey perform magic, Coco realizes that maybe what seemed like the truth is not exactly reality. Her “magical” dream may not be as far away as it seems… Join us for the premiere screening of Witch Hat Atelier.

events.title: An Intro to Traditional Japanese Instruments with Dekoboko Taiko
events.panelDescription: [Cultural Panel] Dekoboko Taiko invites you to learn about the rich history of traditional Japanese instruments, particularly percussion and winds, and their cultural influence in Japan and the world. This fun and interactive panel will include a performance and demonstration by members of the local Seattle group Dekoboko Taiko. Explore the festive beats of the taiko, the dancing clicks of the naruko, the lively melodies of the fue, and a few more surprises! Participants will be able to try out many of the featured instruments and enjoy a full performance from the group!

events.title: Do You Know Your Anime?
events.panelDescription: [Fan Panel] 3rd year in a row! Anime trivia with a twist. Volunteers will be interviewed and quizzed on all things anime, with the potential to win prizes and flex their knowledge in a fun environment. Guess the tune, badly described anime, and general trivia questions across the world of anime.

events.title: Pokemon TCG – Free Build & Battle Event
events.panelDescription:
[Gaming] Oh, it’s all very fine and well to take your carefully-curated team to victory – but someone who’s true Champion material has that special something that lets them bond with a team they’ve only just met, intuitively understand their strengths and weaknesses, and lead them to glory.

How do you develop a talent like that, you ask?

Why, many rounds of Build & Battle, of course! Assemble your deck from the contents of the provided Build & Battle Box, and battle your way to to the top of the mountain… or at least to a good time. All participants will also receive a ticket for the Grand Giveaway!

Reservation tickets will be available at the TCG Infodesk on the day of the event. Unclaimed spots will be filled first-come-first-serve from attendees present at event start time.

No matter what, if you complete a learn to play session you will receive a ticket for our Grand Giveaway on Sunday!
